title: Replace stale Zephyr selectors
description: Update active workflows, scripts, README, CONTRIBUTING, and Renode documentation that invoke nrf52840_lichen, t_echo_nrf52840, rak4631_nrf52840, heltec_lora32_v3, or unsupported tbeam_supreme as west board selectors. Preserve internal model directory names where they are not commands.
acceptance_criteria: Repository search finds no active invalid west selector; commands use canonical HWMv2 selectors; shell, Python, workflow, and documentation examples validate.
